name: luly-v0-2-3
description: Author Luly flows (academies, courses, marketing campaigns, waitlists, interactive proposals) end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2 collapses the 10-stage JSON pipeline into 5 stages of markdown context-passing. Each run lives in its own subdirectory under tmp/luly-agent/ for isolation. Default illustration approach is inline SVG (base64) with the caption preserved as a prompt for future image-gen.
